magic-link.subject: Your login link
magic-link.heading: Login link
magic-link.waitingConfirmation: Click the button below to log in to your account. This link will expire in 15 minutes.
magic-link.closing: If you did not request this link, you can ignore this email.

emergency.title: Emergency Access
emergency.description: Enter your email address to receive a login link.

waiting.description_standard: we just sent a login link to {email}.
waiting.description_emergency: we just generated a recovery link for {email}.
waiting.help_standard: Didn't receive anything? Check your spam or request a new link.
waiting.help_emergency: If you don't see the link, request a new one.

toast.check_email: Check your email for the login link
toast.check_console: Check your access for the emergency link
